docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DEREK SOAN, CEO FILED BY DEFENDANT METAL DESIGN AND STRATEGY, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIM, DANIEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT METAL DESIGN AND STRATEGY, INC. JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT V. PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-04-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT METAL DESIGN AND STRATEGY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF DANIEL KIM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT METAL DESIGN AND STRATEGY INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DEREK SOAN, CEO AND MICHAEL SOAN, OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDREICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, DANIEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT METAL DESIGN AND STRATEGY, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY KIM, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT METAL DESIGN AND STRATEGY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
